title: Run L0 Discovery Advisor Evaluation Evidence Corpus
objective: Run the completed diagnostic-only L0 discovery advisor evaluator on a representative corpus of saved context-pack manifests so the project can record concrete evidence about suggestion usefulness, redundancy, noise, missing or invalid advisor diagnostics, and safety before considering any automatic L0 inclusion behavior.
proposed_change: Add a proposal-only evidence-corpus slice that produces or collects saved context-pack manifest JSON fixtures, runs scripts/evaluate_l0_discovery_advisor.py against them, and records the resulting evaluation evidence. The slice must remain observational and must not change context selection, prompts, retrieval, embeddings, indexes, memory stores, token-budget behavior, reranking, or adapters.
rationale: PLAN-20260707-0001 completed the evaluator but did not yet run a substantive evidence corpus.
GAP-0001 remains open because automatic L0 discovery from selected context is still not implemented.
The completed evaluator is useful only after representative manifest evidence is gathered and reviewed.
An evidence-corpus slice is safer than automatic inclusion because it measures observed advisor behavior without changing runtime behavior.
Corpus evidence can support or reject a later PLAN for automatic include_l0 or adapter behavior.
constraints: Proposal only: no implementation is admitted by this PLAN record.
No vector index or document index mutation.
No token-budget enforcement or token-budget telemetry.
Use only saved manifests or deterministic fixtures as evaluator inputs.
Any evidence-corpus implementation requires separate admission by WARRANT before governed improvement work begins.
success_criteria: SELF_MODEL records PLAN-20260707-0002 as completed with supported completion warrant WARR-20260707-0004.
The completed slice remains diagnostic-only and does not approve automatic L0 inclusion.
Evidence corpus output is recorded under docs/reviews/l0_discovery_advisor_evidence_corpus.
Tests prove no context item, prompt, retrieval, embedding, index, memory, token-budget, reranking, or adapter side effects.
SELF-AUDIT remains green after the completed PLAN, verification, and completion warrant are indexed.
risk: Evaluation evidence may be mistaken for approval of automatic L0 inclusion unless the plan keeps evidence gathering separate from selection, prompt construction, retrieval, embeddings, indexes, memory stores, token-budget systems, reranking, and adapters.
next_action: No further implementation remains for PLAN-20260707-0002. Any automatic include_l0 behavior or other runtime behavior change requires a separate PLAN/WARRANT.
